title: lindernia racemosa
intro: Lindernia racemosa, also known as false lipenia or water-pimpernel, is a species of flowering plant in the family Linderniaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Lindernia racemosa is often used in the form of teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being applied topically to wounds and skin conditions.
